steps.rationale: Fetched CXG::scRNA-seq::ZNF326 knockdown: 48,000 cells × 22,000 genes. Mito ≤ 12.0%, doublets 4.00%. Ready for downstream.
ZNF326 knockdown is linked to pathways ['cell cycle']; 1 expected-up and 1 expected-down genes.
scGPT — 33M cells; supports perturbation head out of the box. Plus a small perturbation adapter head.
Adamw + lr=0.0003 for 10 epochs on scGPT with batch=128; by_donor CV, early stop on val_loss_plateau_3.
DEG overlap@K=0.00, held-out AUROC=0.50, calibration=0.00. Negative control AUROC=0.50 (should be ≈0.5).
Fetched CXG::scRNA-seq::ZNF326 knockdown: 48,000 cells × 22,000 genes. Mito ≤ 12.0%, doublets 4.00%. Ready for downstream.
